Colette Riley 6 months ago on Google
Food: 3 Service: 4 Atmosphere: 3
Request content removal
Rocco Filippi 6 months ago on Google
So we take a motorcycle ride up to More Brewing in Huntley and run into this very nice barkeep. We told her where we were going to eat while in town. She suggested Sammy's. So we gave them a try. What a delightful surprise. All 4 of us were happy with the quick service and the waitress was on it when we made changes to our order from what was on the menu. "No problem!" she told us every time we added or deleted something that came in our choices. Drinks were delivered asap. And when the food arrived I was thinking how I was going to try and eat all of it there was so much. The whole time we were there she came over and asked us if we needed anything. My cup of coffee never got empty. And her personality was right up there with the old "down home small town" theme. We had a wonderful conversation with her. She introduced us to not only the other waitress as we went along but with all the talk of how we really enjoyed the food and service she had the owner/cook come out and we forwarded our opinion to him and expressed how we felt. I then told them that I HAD to leave a review with context to the entire experience. I would have to say as many greasy spoons as I have been to this one is at the top of my list. And the people with me would agree to that I am sure. If your in the mood for some great breakfast with good people and are really hungry this is the place for you. Oh, and did I say the prices were actually lower for once than what we received in return?! Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5 Price per person: $10–20
Request content removal
Nichole Claude 6 months ago on Google
Been here a few times, everything I have had so far was delicious. Employees are also friendly and inviting.
Request content removal
dan krause 6 months ago on Google
We stopped in for dinner and a drink. I had what turned out to be the best hamburger I have had in months. Obviously made fresh, it came with fries that were almost as good. My wife had a gyro sandwich that was, according to her, as good as my burger. My drink wasl larger than I expected, but proved to be as good as the burger. The bar tended to be a little noisy at times, but what the hell, this is a bar. I also had to give five stars for the great service from the lady who also had to tend bar. The place is obviously worth coming back to, and we definitely will! Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 4

Megan Tinsley a year ago on Google
We stopped in late after a long day, drawn by the good reviews, and we were not disappointed! The curly fries were perfectly cooked, and my husband's tater tots were excellent. The vegetable soup was wonderful, and the pulled pork sandwich was tasty. It's a great local spot with delicious food. I would definitely stop in again. Thanks! Service: Dine in Meal type: Dinner Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5

Deborah Weaver a year ago on Facebook
Friday Nite is our Date Nite for my hubby Kevin n I as it is my day off from the hospital. We get the Friday nite all you can eat Fish Fry which is GREAT!! Plus if we are in the mood for Breakfast?? You can get Breakfast all day and the pancakes that come with your Breakfast are sweet fluffy and delish!!! They have really good burgers too!!! And the Bloody Mary’s go good with the Breakfast items!! Almost forgot , cold beer with the Fish Fry is a most!!!

Matt Kovar 2 years ago on Google
We went to Sammy's to see the band, Bad Penny. We were warmly greeted by the bartender and promptly served. The prices were reasonable, and they had a nice hazy IPA. We ate no food, so we can't render an opinion. The patrons were friendly and the small dance floor was adequate for us to have some fun. Service: 5 Atmosphere: 3 Service: Dine in Meal type: Other Price per person: $1–10

Derek Petrucci Jr 2 years ago on Google
Great family place , good is fantastic. Sammy is one of the best guys around hands down Sammy’s is home . Whether you just hang out have a drink or pull up with your girl listen to the bands . Hang out with your family or friends. Great casual place with a great atmosphere. Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5 Service: Takeaway Meal type: Other Price per person: $10–20 Recommended dishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Fried Shrimp with Curly Fries, Italian Omelette, Cheese Curds, Pretzel, Wings, Biscuits and Gravy, 2 Eggs, Soft Shell Tacos, Mozzarella Sticks, 4 Pieces French Toast, Ribeye Steak N' Eggs, Eggs Benedict, Corned Beef Hash Omelet, Side of Hash Browns, Hickory Burger, Breakfast Burrito, Pizza Omelette Parking space: Plenty of parking Parking options: Free of charge parking lot, Free of charge street parking Parking: Bottom line if you want that old school bar atmosphere. Sammy’s is the place . From a shot and a beer to set them up . Or if you just want some good old fashioned home cooked meals . Kid-friendliness: Absolutely family & kid friendly. John Dwyer 2 years ago on Google
Either the manager or the owner neglected to update their Google account to indicate the correct hours of operation. In fact, as I write this review the hours of operation are still incorrect on Google. We had a group of 11 people hoping to enjoy Sammy's on Saturday June 3 at 7:30AM. After dealing with locked doors and no phone answer, we decided to patronize their competitor, Village Inn.

David Vincent 3 years ago on Google
Sammy's is a great place where you will not leave hungry. There are very typical selections of bar food here and a pile of it all appears to be made in house, it's really tasty. The service is great, to the point where the waitress recognized my friends, who are regulars, and knew what their orders would be. She recognized that I was not a regular and spent extra time ensuring she would get my order correct. Always looking forward to my next visit. Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5 Service: Dine in Meal type: Dinner Price per person: $10–20 Parking space: Plenty of parking Parking options: Free of charge parking lot Parking: The parking is on both sides of of the place but with the railroad crossing and weird curbs, it can be difficult to find.

Great Breakfast. Food: 5 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5

Dr Don Stien 3 years ago on Google
Food was good, service was VERY slow. Had to keep asking to refill my coffee because the food took forever to come to the table and there were hardly any customers in the place. It was like all the workers were still asleep and working in slow motion. Don't think I will be back anytime soon if at all. BRUNCH CAFE beats the living daylights out of this place. BRUNCH CAFE Is a few dollars more BUT WELL WORTH IT!!! Food: 3 Service: 1 Atmosphere: 1

Alex Macaluso 3 years ago on Google
1st time visit something out of the 60's tavern, bar .Friend whom knows Sammy for years wants to be hired two days or better. Seems that only hiring for short order cooks for the present. Request content removal
Mark 3 years ago on Google
Never expected but had a great experience here. Went with my parents and kids on a Saturday night. Got to choose where to sit. Waitress help us right away. Menu had lots of options much more then a typical bar menu. Food came quick and was just as ordered. The food was really really good. Everyone complimented their plate. Nothing super special but again very good and large servicing. The waitress was very attentive and was especially good with the my little kids. She really was over the top even giving them a snack at the end of the dinner. Had a great time and looking forward to now trying their breakfast. Service: Dine in Meal type: Dinner Price per person: $50–100

Alan Scott 4 years ago on Google

Michael Nicholson 4 years ago on Google
Went with others as a group just before noon. Breakfast is available all day so I gave it a try. The Denver omelet, with cheese, hash browns and raisin toast was all I could have wanted. They also accommodated a group of about 15, during lunch, very handily. I'm sure to be back again. I've had a burger and fries here in the past. They are now 2 for 2 in good solid meals. Service: Dine in Meal type: Breakfast Price per person: $10–20
Request content removal
John Toth 4 years ago on Google
Sammy's is a good neighborhood bar with a good size menu. The food and drinks are good and the prices are reasonable. I've eaten breakfast, lunch, and dinners there often and have always gotten great meals and service. The wait staff is friendly and attentive. I love this place. Service: Dine in Meal type: Dinner Price per person: $10–20

Michael Glaviano 5 years ago on Facebook
My wife and I visited Sammy's for diner for the first time and let me say now that it wont be the last. It was a Friday night so I had to go with the fish fry and my Wife had the corned beef melt, we both agreed our food was VERY good the beer cold and the margarita tasty. The staff could not have been better, and the it is a GREAT value. We are so happy we gave Sammy's a try, we have a new favorite, try it and I think you will too.
Thanks
S
Sammy's Bar & Grill Huntley 5 years ago
Thank you so much for the kind words. So glad you enjoyed and we will be looking forward to seeing you in the future.

Request content removal
Paula Brooks 5 years ago on Facebook
So this is not our first time here and usually get good service. But today went past bad service! That’s coming from someone in the business! Me and my husband have came there and had a few drinks or we come and eat with and without our family. Today we got there and 10:15 ish. We sat for a while before going in and letting them know we were there. ( after watching the younger girl see us and other lady come out more then once)A couple that came after us got drinks and ordered even before we were even Acknowledged! Apparently we should have sat in tent and not on the side! Finally we were asked our drinks which we told the lady. Then waiting longer while same two girls come out deliver food, salt and pepper, refill others coffee and take more drink orders for people two tables away .... all while we still had nothing. My biggest upset is the lack of acknowledgment! Maybe the two of you needed more help. But as someone in the business acknowledge hey sorry you still have no drinks and no service 35 mins later. But we got nothing ... not even the drinks we ordered. But apparently in this crazy time you didn’t need our family of 4 business. So we will now take elsewhere.
K

It's a typical neighborhood bar. I go there more often for their breakfast then to hang out and drink. So I really can't comment on that or how it is in the weekend nights.
